name: Pork with Vegetables and Cashews
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen Peas, thawed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into cubes measuring 3/4 inch in size.
2. Slice the onion and separate it into rings.
3. Slice the pimientos from their jar (ensure they weigh 2 ounces).
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl, mixing well.
